sections.paragraph: μυϰτηρίζω [μύξα ‘snot’ via μυϰτήρ ‘nostril’, cp. μυχϑίζω ‘snort, sneer’] the primary sense ‘show contempt through nasal gesture’, turn up the nose at, sneer is used by ext. w. dramatic force in Gal 6:7: ϑεὸς οὐ μυϰτηρίζεται God is not one to be treated with contempt, i.e. trifling with God is done at immense hazard.
